title: ParkPulse
tagLine: A crowd prediction and visit planning tool for UK theme parks. Combines weather, school holidays, events, and ride data to forecast busyness and generate personalised itineraries for Alton Towers, Thorpe Park, Chessington, and LEGOLAND Windsor.

title: Shopkeeper
tagLine: A polished React single-page application built with Vite and tested with Vitest, showcasing client-side architecture, API integration, and responsive UI design.

title: To-do List/Habit Tracker
tagLine: A React application for managing tasks and building habits, featuring complex state management and structured local storage persistence.

title: Static Dashboard
tagLine: A static dashboard layout built to demonstrate clean visual structure, spacing, and responsive grid techniques using HTML, CSS, and Tailwind.
